title: Staff AI Platform Engineer
company_focus:
AI marketing platform for brands to engage consumers on AI
channels
description:
About the Position:

As a Staff AI Platform Engineer, you’ll play a pivotal role
in shaping how AI is adopted and applied across our
organization. You’ll be responsible for driving AI-first
initiatives that improve developer productivity, streamline
workflows, and unlock new product capabilities. This is a
highly cross-functional role focused on delivering real
business outcomes.

We’re at an early stage in our AI journey. Teams are
exploring different approaches, and there is strong
curiosity and momentum across the organization. Your role
will be to bring structure, standards, and clarity, helping
teams use AI effectively and consistently while ensuring
solutions scale across the business.

Reporting to the VP of Engineering, you’ll work closely with
engineering, product, and leadership teams to identify high-
impact use cases, integrate AI into our software development
lifecycle, and enable teams to build and ship faster. You’ll
also help evaluate emerging technologies, including agentic
capabilities, and guide how they can be applied to our
products and internal workflows.

Your success will depend on collaboration, influence, and
the ability to align teams around practical, measurable
solutions. You’ll act as a trusted advisor across the
organization, coaching engineers, defining standards, and
helping teams adopt AI in a way that improves productivity
and delivers meaningful results.

This role is remote in Germany.

What you’ll be doing:

- Drive the adoption of AI across the organization by
  identifying and implementing high-impact use cases that
  improve developer productivity and operational efficiency.
- Integrate AI tooling into the software development
  lifecycle, enabling faster delivery, improved code
  quality, and more efficient workflows.
- Define standards, guidelines, and best practices for how AI
  is used across teams to ensure consistency, scalability,
  and maintainability.
- Provide input into the product roadmap based on a deep
  understanding of evolving AI and agentic technologies,
  helping the team identify new capabilities and product
  opportunities.
- Work closely with teams to understand their workflows,
  gather requirements, and prioritize solutions that deliver
  measurable value.
- Establish metrics and feedback mechanisms to evaluate the
  effectiveness of AI initiatives, including developer
  productivity and operational impact.
- Coach and mentor engineers on how to effectively use AI
  tools and frameworks in their day-to-day work.
- Contribute to building a culture of experimentation,
  continuous learning, and responsible AI adoption across
  the organization.

Qualifications:

- Strong background in software engineering, platform
  engineering, developer productivity, or similar roles
  focused on improving engineering workflows.
- Hands-on experience designing and implementing AI-powered
  applications, automation workflows, or developer tooling.
- Experience working in an AI-first or AI-enabled
  organization.
- Experience integrating AI tools or capabilities into real-
  world engineering processes or products.
- Strong system design and architectural thinking, with the
  ability to balance short-term experimentation with long-
  term scalability.
- Experience working with modern programming languages such as
  TypeScript or Python.
- Experience working with cloud platforms and distributed
  systems.
- Demonstrated ability to gather requirements, prioritize use
  cases, and measure the impact of technical initiatives.
- Strong communication and collaboration skills, with the
  ability to influence teams and drive adoption across an
  organization.
- Experience working in fast-paced, evolving environments
  where ambiguity and experimentation are part of the
  process.

About Bluefish:

Bluefish believes that AI represents the next major chapter
of the internet – and that consumers will increasingly use
AI to consume information and media online. On this new AI
internet, brands will need new tools and technologies to
tell their stories to consumers online – and a new marketing
ecosystem will be created around AI. Bluefish is building
the platform that helps brands engage consumers on this new
AI channel, with powerful enterprise tools to manage AI
brand safety and engage consumers with thoughtful and
personalized AI marketing experiences.

The Bluefish team is a tight-knit group of mar-tech industry
veterans who previously helped build foundational ad-tech
platforms now owned by Meta and Microsoft. Bluefish, the
leading AI marketing platform for the Fortune 500, recently
announced a $43 million Series B growth financing co-led by
Threshold Ventures and NEA with participation from multiple
enterprise investors including Amex Ventures, TIAA Ventures,
Salesforce Ventures, and continued participation from
Bloomberg Beta. We are a globally distributed team, with
business operations based in New York City and engineering
based in Europe and New York. 

Why Bluefish & Our Values:

- Unique opportunity to join on the ground floor of a fast-
  moving startup building at the center of AI
- Tackle challenging and abstract problems while disrupting
  the $300BN legacy mar-tech industry
- Join an experienced high-performing team where you will have
  immediate ownership and impact
- Experience a true meritocracy with significant career growth
  upside as the business scales

Our Values:

- Demonstrated grit and resourcefulness - you find creative
  solutions, adapt quickly, and aren’t afraid to roll up
  your sleeves in a fast-paced, evolving environment.
- Thoughtful and strategic thinker with the ability to
  anticipate needs, ask the right questions, and deliver
  insights that truly drive value.
- Proven ability to collaborate across functions and roles,
  fostering open communication and shared ownership of
  outcomes.
- Commitment to craftsmanship - you take pride in delivering
  high-quality work, paying attention to the small details
  while keeping the big picture in mind.
- Self-starter with a proactive mindset and a strong sense of
  accountability - able to drive projects forward
  independently while staying aligned with team goals.
- Comfortable navigating ambiguity and learning new tools,
  processes, or technologies to get the job done.
responsibilities: Drive adoption of AI across the organization by identifying and implementing high-impact use cases for developer productivity and operational efficiency
Integrate AI tooling into the software development lifecycle to enable faster delivery and improved code quality
Define standards, guidelines, and best practices for AI usage across teams to ensure consistency and scalability
Provide input into the product roadmap based on understanding of evolving AI and agentic technologies
Establish metrics and feedback mechanisms to evaluate the effectiveness of AI initiatives
Coach and mentor engineers on effective use of AI tools and frameworks
Contribute to building a culture of experimentation and responsible AI adoption across the organization
use_cases: AI-powered developer productivity and workflow automation
AI integration into software development lifecycle for faster delivery
AI brand safety management for enterprise brands
Personalized AI marketing experiences for consumers
Agentic AI capabilities applied to products and internal workflows
ai_classification_reasoning:
This role is focused on driving AI adoption across the
organization by integrating AI tooling into developer
workflows, defining standards, and coaching teams — not
building or fine-tuning AI/ML models directly. The engineer
works as a platform/internal enablement role that supports
other teams in using AI effectively, making this an ai-
support position.
